title: US charges Cuba's Raúl Castro with murder over 1996 downing of two planes
snippet: Cuba's current president says the charges against Castro - including conspiracy to kill US nationals and destruction of aircraft - are a "political manoeuvre".

title: China says US should stop 'threats' against Cuba after ex-leader charged
snippet: It comes after the US charged Cuba's ex-leader with murder, the latest move putting pressure on the regime.

title: Gonorrhoea and syphilis hit record levels in Europe
snippet: STIs have surged thanks to record cases and gaps in testing and prevention, a health agency reports.

title: Dozens of vehicles burnt as Mali jihadists enforce blockade
snippet: Mali is a landlocked country and depends heavily on fuel transported from neighbouring countries.

title: Rosenberg: Putin enjoys Xi's Chinese welcome but heads home without pipeline deal
snippet: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder on the world stage, but it became clear there are limits, says the BBC's Russia Editor.

title: DR Congo cancels World Cup training camp over Ebola outbreak
snippet: The outbreak, caused by a rare Ebola species, is thought to have caused 139 deaths so far.

title: Sierra Leone becomes latest African country to receive deportees from US
snippet: Nine deportees arrive from the US as part of Donald Trump's crackdown on illegal immigration.

title: Nvidia's latest record result fails to impress investors
snippet: The chip giant reported more stellar results but its shares fell after-hours as investors wonder if it can keep up its pace of growth amid greater competition.

title: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
snippet: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.

title: Murder or accident? Mystery of Mango tycoon's hiking death after son's arrest
snippet: Isak Andic's son Jonathan denies involvement in the fatal fall of his father, who founded one of Europe's biggest clothing empires.

title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
snippet: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

title: SpaceX files for stock market debut that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
snippet: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX

title: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
snippet: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.

title: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
snippet: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.

title: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
snippet: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
